messages.content: # Bought VIP, but you didn't get any Discord roles? Follow this guide!

# Bought VIP, but you didn't get any Discord roles? Follow this guide!

# Step 1: 
> Log into [nohesi.gg](<https://nohesi.gg/manage/profile>) and click your **profile picture** -> **edit profile**
> 
> Ensure the **correct discord account** / **steam account** is linked.

# Step 2:
> If the **subscription shows**: do method 1
> 
> If the subscription is **NOT shown**: do method 2

## Method 1 - (subscription showing)
> Go back to your social links (see step 1), and **unlink + relink** your Discord account.
## Method 2 - (subscription not showing)
> On the website -> click your **profile picture** -> **billing** -> **cancel**. From here, click the `cancel subscription` button -> confirm the cancel -> then click `don't cancel subscription`
> 
> This video shows exactly what you will need to do:
### If none of these steps work, please get in touch with a staff member in <#964650227342655499>
